template:
---
name: my-kata-solver
description: One line — what this Skill makes the model do.
---

Write your Skill body here. It becomes the system prompt the model runs under.

Shorter and more precise beats longer and verbose — Skill length is in the score.
Copy this file to `submissions/<your-github-handle>/<kata_id>.md` (e.g. `submissions/octocat/001.md`).

katas.name: pr-review
katas.desc: Audit a PR diff → JSON of security concerns, perf hotspots, missing tests.

katas.name: refactor-async
katas.desc: Convert a sync Python module to async/await, behaviour unchanged.

katas.name: cron-next
katas.desc: next_run(expr, after) for 5-field cron — steps, ranges, the day-of-month/day-of-week OR rule, leap years.

katas.name: bug-hunt
katas.desc: Make a failing test pass with the smallest fix.

katas.name: secure-query
katas.desc: Rewrite an injectable DB module to parameterized queries — functional AND injection tests.

katas.name: optimize
katas.desc: Rewrite an O(n²) function to O(n). Correct on edge cases, or it times out.

katas.name: task-pool
katas.desc: async run_pool(tasks, limit) — bounded concurrency, results in input order.

katas.name: semver
katas.desc: compare(a, b) per SemVer 2.0.0 — the full pre-release precedence chain.
